case_level_notes: Applicant fails physical presence under the five-year track per worksheet (24 < 30 months). Other eligibility prongs lack facts in packet.

determinations.rationale: No facts provided regarding continuous residence absences or breaks.
Worksheet shows 24 months physically present during the five-year period; general track requires at least 30 months.
No facts provided about state or USCIS district residence.
No facts provided about English ability or exceptions.
No facts provided about civics knowledge or exceptions.
No facts provided about attachment to the Constitution or oath.
No facts provided regarding GMC bars or conduct.
Physical presence shortfall (24 of required 30 months) and multiple missing facts warrant human review.
